title: Create User - Happy Path with Valid Mandatory Details
description: Verify that an admin can successfully create a new user when all mandatory fields are provided with valid data and optional fields are included.
preconditions: Admin user exists with a valid JWT token having CREATE_USER permission
Supported roles list includes ADMIN and USER

steps.action: Send POST request to /api/v1/users with valid Authorization header and JSON payload

steps.expected_result: Response contains userId (non‑empty, unique format), message "User created successfully", status "ACTIVE", and createdDate in ISO‑8601 UTC format

steps.action: Query the Users table for the newly created email
steps.expected_result: Record exists with matching firstName, lastName, role=ADMIN, status=ACTIVE, createdBy set to admin's userId, createdDate matches response createdDate

expected_result: User is created successfully, HTTP 201 returned, audit fields populated and persisted in DB

title: Create User - Duplicate Email Failure
description: Ensure the system rejects creation of a user when the email address already exists in the system.
preconditions: A user with email duplicate.user@test.com already exists

steps.action: Send POST request to /api/v1/users with payload containing duplicate email

steps.expected_result: errorCode equals "USR_409" and message contains "Email already exists"

expected_result: User creation is blocked, appropriate error code/message returned, no new record created

title: Create User - Invalid Email Format
description: Validate that the API rejects a request when the email field does not conform to standard email format.

steps.action: Send POST request to /api/v1/users with malformed email address

steps.expected_result: errorCode indicates validation error (e.g., "USR_400") and message mentions invalid email format

expected_result: Request is rejected with clear validation error for email format
